outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Iran fires on U.S. ships in Strait of Hormuz, in threat to ceasefire
outlets.summary: WaPo leads with Iran firing on US ships in the Strait of Hormuz as the most serious threat yet to the April 8 ceasefire. CENTCOM confirms 6 Iranian fast boats destroyed by US helicopters; CENTCOM denies any US Navy ship was struck.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: The UAE says Iran resumes attacks as the U.S. moves to reopen the Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: NPR covers UAE's first Iranian-attack interceptions since the April 8 ceasefire, ADNOC tanker drone strike, and VTTI Fujairah oil terminal fire. Pope Leo XIV calls Trump's destruction threat 'truly unacceptable.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump warns Iran will be 'blown off face of earth' if Iran attacks US vessels
outlets.summary: Fox leads with Trump's annihilation warning during Project Freedom operations. Covers US Apache and Seahawk helicopters destroying 6 Iranian fast boats. Hegseth: 'dominant control of airspace.'

outlets.name: Newsweek
outlets.headline: Donald Trump Says Iran to Be Blown Off 'Face of Earth' as Tehran Fires at US Ships
outlets.summary: Newsweek frames Trump's threat as direct response to alleged Iranian fire on US Navy. Quotes CENTCOM Adm. Cooper denying US ships were struck. Two US-flagged merchant vessels successfully transit Hormuz.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: UAE says intercepted missiles, drone sparks fire at oil site
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog leads with UAE intercepting 12 ballistic missiles, 3 cruise missiles, 4 drones from Iran. ADNOC tanker BARAKAH drone strike. UAE schools to remote learning May 5-8. Iran calls Project Freedom a 'ceasefire violation.'

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Fujairah Oil Terminal Hit by Drone Strike in UAE, Fire Reported at Facility
outlets.summary: Bloomberg covers VTTI Fujairah oil terminal drone fire (3 Indian workers injured). Brent surges to $114.06 (+5.45% intraday) — 4-year high during session before paring gains. WTI tops $106.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF at 'high readiness' as Trump says Iran to be 'blown off face of the earth' if it hits US ships
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog leads with IDF placed at 'high readiness' for possible Iran war resumption. Netanyahu cancelled corruption-trial testimony citing 'political and security meetings.' Covers UAE attacks and Trump's threat.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump Says Iran Will Be 'Blown Off the Face of the Earth' if They Attack U.S. Navy Vessels
outlets.summary: Haaretz live tracker: Trump's annihilation threat, Project Freedom underway, Iran first attack on UAE since ceasefire, Israeli Iron Dome battery in UAE intercepts at least one Iranian missile.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran's military vows to target any foreign forces approaching Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: PressTV leads with Maj. Gen. Ali Abdollahi (Khatam al-Anbiya HQ) warning that 'any foreign military force...that intends to approach or enter the Strait of Hormuz will be targeted.' Frames US Project Freedom as illegal interference.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: IRGC vows to 'forcefully stop' ships violating Strait of Hormuz regulations
outlets.summary: PressTV: IRGC issues new map expanding Hormuz control zone east to include UAE Fujairah and Khorfakkan. Warns commercial ships and oil tankers must coordinate with IRGC Navy. Iranian Parliament: any US interference is 'ceasefire violation.'
